Metadata.title: AVAStudio
Metadata.description: Content and publishing management platform for multiple accounts
Metadata.marketingTitle: AVAStudio — publishing scheduler for multiple accounts
Metadata.marketingDescription: Content management platform: media library, video variant preparation, and scheduled publishing across multiple accounts.

Marketing.ctaSubtitle: Create your workspace in a couple of minutes and connect your platform accounts.

featuresPage.metaDescription: Media library, clip variant preparation and scheduled publishing.
featuresPage.heading: AVAStudio Features
featuresPage.subtitle: Everything you need to manage content and schedule publishing across multiple accounts.

pricingPage.metaDescription: Transparent AVAStudio pricing: from the free Starter to custom Enterprise.
pricingPage.heading: Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your content volume. Pay by card or crypto.

Accounts.title: Accounts
Accounts.subtitle: Manage your connected platform accounts.
Accounts.credsNote: Credentials are encrypted (AES-256-GCM) and never stored in plaintext. Authorization via mock driver.

Media.title: Media library
Media.subtitle: Manage content: upload, validation and asset search.
Media.ffprobeHint: Video passes ffprobe validation (up to 10 min, 4K, 500 MB).

Editor.title: Editor
Editor.step1desc: Choose a video from the media library.
Editor.resultsNote: Results are automatically added to the media library.
Editor.subtitle: Variant builder: source video + parameters → preview → render.

Calendar.title: Calendar
Calendar.subtitle: Publishing scheduler for multiple accounts. Drag a post to another day.
Calendar.scheduleDesc: Content → account → time. Creates a posting_job (mock posting).

Diagnose.title: Account diagnostics
Diagnose.subtitle: Clear explanation of issues and step-by-step actions.
Diagnose.allGood: Account is operating normally. No action required.

Uniqueizer.title: Uniqueizer
Uniqueizer.subtitle: Turn one video into dozens of unique copies for different accounts.
Uniqueizer.step1desc: Pick a clip from your library.
Uniqueizer.noVideos: No videos. Upload them in Media.
Uniqueizer.step2desc: What to vary in each copy.
Uniqueizer.hint: Each copy uses its own seed — deterministic and reproducible. Results land in Media.
Uniqueizer.resultsNote: Finished copies are added to your library as they complete.

Music.title: Music
Music.subtitle: Platform trends and an audio mixer over your media library.
Music.trendsDesc: This week's popular tracks. Import into your library for editing.
Music.mixerDesc: Pick at least 2 audio assets from your library and build a mix.
Music.noAudio: No audio in your library yet. Import a track from trends.
Music.mixHint: The finished mix appears in your library as an audio asset.
Music.mixDone: Mix built and added to your library.

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.subtitle: Reach, posts and engagement across platforms.
Analytics.postsChartDesc: How many posts went out each day.
Analytics.byPlatformDesc: Share of reach and posts per platform.

Autopilot.title: Autopilot Center
Autopilot.subtitle: Automatically spreads posts across accounts during prime time.
Autopilot.caption: Caption
Autopilot.done: Created {n} posts. See them in Calendar.

Generate.title: AI Generation
Generate.subtitle: Images, voiceover and music. Results go to your library.
Generate.done: Done: {provider}, {ms} ms. Asset in your library.

image.title: Image generation
image.desc: Describe a shot — get an image.

Generate.hint: Phase 1 uses deterministic mock providers with fallback. Real models plug in for Phase 2.

Proxies.title: Proxy Pool
Proxies.subtitle: Sticky proxy binding per account: assign and rotate.
Proxies.poolDesc: Each account keeps a stable IP. Rotate only when needed.
Proxies.hint: Proxy credentials are encrypted inside the manager and never exposed. Real providers — Phase 2.

Personas.title: AI Personas
Personas.subtitle: Generation profiles: tone, niche, language and prompt template.
Personas.formDesc: A persona sets the style for AI generation and captions.
Personas.name: Name

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Account profile and preferences.
Settings.profileDesc: How you appear in the system.
Settings.emailHint: Email can't be changed — it's your login.

Audit.title: Audit log
Audit.subtitle: History of significant actions in your organization.
